title: Max Difference You Can Get From Changing an Integer
titleCn: 改变一个整数能得到的最大差值

testcases.input: num = 555 Output: 888 Explanation: The first time pick x = 5 and y = 9 and store the new integer in a. The second time pick x = 5 and y = 1 and store the new integer in b. We have now a = 999 and b = 111 and max difference = 888
testcases.expectedOutput: 888 Explanation: The first time pick x = 5 and y = 9 and store the new integer in a. The second time pick x = 5 and y = 1 and store the new integer in b. We have now a = 999 and b = 111 and max difference = 888

testcases.input: num = 9 Output: 8 Explanation: The first time pick x = 9 and y = 9 and store the new integer in a. The second time pick x = 9 and y = 1 and store the new integer in b. We have now a = 9 and b = 1 and max difference = 8
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The first time pick x = 9 and y = 9 and store the new integer in a. The second time pick x = 9 and y = 1 and store the new integer in b. We have now a = 9 and b = 1 and max difference = 8
